2026-04-27T18:58:26.3257311Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-27T18:58:26.3257967Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-27T18:58:26.3258439Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-27T18:58:26.3258866Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-27T18:58:26.3259201Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-27T18:58:26.3259450Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-27T18:58:26.3259627Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-27T18:58:26.3259821Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-27T18:58:26.3260005Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-27T18:58:26.3260244Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-27T18:58:26.3260460Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-27T18:58:26.3260774Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-27T18:58:26.3261074Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
2026-04-27T18:58:26.3261297Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-27T18:58:26.3261581Z [36;1mecho "Safe Outputs MCP server will run on port ${PORT}"[0m
